products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Manage your products and track CRA compliance.

timeline.emptyWindow: No products created in this range.

products.noProductsDescription: Add your first product to start your CRA compliance journey. We'll guide you through every step.
products.noProductsDescriptionTopbar: Use the “+ New Product” button in the top bar to add your first one — we'll guide you through every step.

create.title: Add Product
create.subtitle: Create a new product to begin CRA compliance tracking.
create.imageHint: JPG, PNG, or WebP. Max 2 MB.
create.startAssessmentDescription: Immediately run the CRA scope assessment after creating this product.

name.title: Product name
name.body: The marketing or commercial name of the product as it appears on packaging, labels, and the end-user-facing Declaration of Conformity.
name.ref: CRA Annex V(2) — the Declaration of Conformity must identify the product by name and model so a market-surveillance authority can match a physical unit to the declaration.

type.title: Product type
type.body: Whether the product is a physical device (hardware), a software application, an embedded/firmware component, or an IoT device. Drives the CRA classification workflow and whether Annex II(3) SBOM obligations apply.
type.ref: CRA Article 2 — defines "product with digital elements" and scopes the regulation. The type you pick here decides whether you fall under CRA at all and what essential requirements (Annex I) apply.

description.title: Description
description.body: Short internal description — one or two sentences about what the product does, who it's for, and any distinctive feature. Used on dashboard lists and in technical documentation.
description.ref: Feeds Annex II(1) of the technical documentation: a general description of the product including its intended purpose.

image.title: Product image
image.body: Optional photo of the product. Purely cosmetic — helps teammates recognise the product in lists and dashboards. JPG, PNG, or WebP up to 2 MB.
image.ref: Not a CRA requirement. No compliance document uses this image.

delete.title: Delete Product
delete.description: This will permanently delete "{name}" and all related assessment answers, checklist items, SBOMs, and documents. This action cannot be undone.

overview.title: Product Overview
overview.name: Name
overview.notAssessedDescription: Run the CRA scope assessment to determine which requirements apply to your product.
overview.noChecklist: No checklist data yet. Complete the assessment first.

assessment.title: CRA Scope Assessment
assessment.completedDescription: This product has been assessed and classified.

checklist.notAssessedDescription: Run the CRA scope assessment to determine which requirements apply to your product. Once done, your personalized compliance checklist will appear here.

sbom.title: Software Bill of Materials
sbom.description: You will be able to upload, generate, and manage SBOMs for this product.

documents.title: Documents
documents.description: You will be able to upload and manage compliance documentation for this product.

limits.reachedDescription: Your {plan} plan allows up to {limit} product. Upgrade to add more products.
limits.reachedDescriptionPlural: Your {plan} plan allows up to {limit} products. Upgrade to add more products.

planGate.readOnlyDescription: The Free plan only includes read-only access to the checklist. Upgrade to Professional to edit checklist items and upload evidence.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.noOrganization: No organization found. Please complete onboarding.
errors.limitReached: You have reached the product limit for your plan.
errors.planLimitReached: You have reached the product limit for your plan. Upgrade to add more products.
